name: Hot Southwestern Roll-Ups
recipeIngredient: Roast beef slices or turkey slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread dressing and salsa on each tortilla.
2. Sprinkle with cheese.
3. Top with meat.
4. Roll up each tortilla tightly.
5. Wrap the rolled-up tortillas in a paper towel.
6. Microwave on HIGH for 1 minute, or until heated through.
